title: The Worst Generation Stands Before Kaido and Big Mom
description: On pages 4–7, this part focuses on Unknown person #5, Yamato, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7, Oden, King as The raid reaches its decisive stage as the Tobiroppo are revealed, Yamato remembers Ace, and the Worst Generation reaches the rooftop to face Kaido and Big Mom.
scene: The raid reaches its decisive stage as the Tobiroppo are revealed, Yamato remembers Ace, and the Worst Generation reaches the rooftop to face Kaido and Big Mom.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: The first time he said that...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: ...we had a good laugh, but...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I wont allow the others to do so!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: We believe in him!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: He truly believes...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: that he can achieve it!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: So...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Whaaa...

dialogue.speaker: Yamato
dialogue.text: What's gotten into you, Yamato?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: never...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: I would never make fun of him!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The King of the Pirates also said the same thing!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Those words had amazed open!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...there is a certain BIG f/GURE that also said the same thing!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So obviously I am not going to make fun of it...your little brother is amazing!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I see...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A big figure, huh? Not bad at all!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'd love to have a drink with him and Luffy!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: They would have gotten along just fine!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: If he wasn't already dead!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: What? Dead?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Finally, here it is...

dialogue.speaker: Yamato
dialogue.text: Your Vivre card!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: What is that? A piece of paper?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This piece of paper will allow us to meet another time!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Think of giving parts of it to the people you would like to see again!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Got it!

dialogue.speaker: Yamato
dialogue.text: We'll meet again right, ace?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Of course!

dialogue.speaker: Yamato
dialogue.text: ACE'S VIVE CARD...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: It faded away, now 2 years ago...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I learned of what happened by reading the journals.

dialogue.speaker: Yamato
dialogue.text: The fact that ace was Roger's son...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: HuffE... hufe...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And that little brother was making a name for himself as a pirate...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The same pirate that you have brought here, Luffy!

dialogue.speaker: Oden
dialogue.text: Oden describes the future like so...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Huff... huff...

dialogue.speaker: King
dialogue.text: ....walking...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yo! Did you guys come to watch my fight?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Mugiwara

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: All I want is your head!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...the next gene-In about ration of Pirates TWENTY who will lead the YEARS next era...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...The next gene ration of Pirate who will lead the next era...

dialogue.speaker: King
dialogue.text: ...WALKING...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They will arrive in the new world!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: If I were to die...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ... They are the ones who will defeat Kaido!!!

summary: This section advances the Wano - The Worst Generation Reaches the Roof storyline with 48 dialogue beats. The raid reaches its decisive stage as the Tobiroppo are revealed, Yamato remembers Ace, and the Worst Generation reaches the rooftop to face Kaido and Big Mom.
